# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Visualizing Tower-Defense Coding
- Summary: Showcase how CodeGrind visualizes programming concepts as towers in Code Breach, highlighting the cyberpunk aesthetic and real-time AI assistance features.

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends interactive DSA practice with a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic, where coding concepts become defensive towers and AI-assisted guidance helps students improve in real time.
- CTA: Try CodeGrind now and see how coding concepts build powerful towers with AI help.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style image featuring cyberpunk-themed Code Breach towers (ForLoop, IfCondition, Function, Variable) on a neon cityscape backdrop. Include subtle UI elements like a code editor pane, AI chat badge, and tower attack particles to convey interactivity without animation.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
